items.title: Trump orders Navy to 'shoot and kill any boat' laying mines in Hormuz Strait
items.description: Trump's post shows the U.S. ratcheting up tensions with Iran over the strait, which has been largely choked off to oil tanker traffic since the war be...

items.title: Trump's lack of focus on economy is spooking Republicans as 2026 election looms

items.title: U.S. Senate votes to advance $70 billion funding plan for ICE, Border Patrol
items.description: U.S. Senate Republicans voted on Thursday to advance a $70 billion plan ⁠to fund the Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Border Patrol agencies.

items.title: Kalshi suspends, fines 3 congressional candidates in 'insider trading' enforcement actions
items.description: The incidents involved a candidate from Virginia seeking a Senate seat and candidates running for House seats from Minnesota and Texas.

items.title: Pirro says DOJ won't drop Fed probe, will appeal judge's order blocking Powell subpoenas
items.description: Powell has accused the DOJ of targeting him for refusing to obey Trump's demand that the Fed sharply lower interest rates.
